patch.value: pm-web-ism0
Spec new package pm-ai for token-efficient context bundles

Define pm-ai as an agent-first package that builds minimal-token context packs from pm items, dependencies, recent activity, and risk signals, with configurable budgets and deterministic section ordering.
Plan
open
codex-5-3
Spec includes prompt/context contract, token budgeting strategy, fallback behavior, safety constraints, extension points, and benchmark methodology against baseline pm context output.
Reduce token cost while improving answer quality for automated coding agents.
Implementation-ready plan for a production package with measurable token and quality targets.

## Proposed command surface
- `pm ai context --budget 3000 --mode planning --json`
- `pm ai handoff --id <item> --budget 1800`
- `pm ai diff-context --since 7d --json`

## Context strategy
- Rank by active status, dependency criticality, recent changes, and blocker impact.
- Enforce deterministic section ordering and token caps.
- Emit quality metadata (`trimmed_sections`, `dropped_items`, `token_estimate`).

## MVP milestones
1) budgeted composer core
2) ranking model + heuristics
3) output templates and eval baseline
closed
Documented command surface, data contracts, MVP milestones, and quality constraints for implementation handoff.
Each new package has an implementation-ready plan item with concrete acceptance criteria and design details.
Spec body and acceptance criteria completed with command proposals, data model expectations, and milestone breakdown.
Phase 6 package spec drafted and acceptance criteria defined.
